content.en:
Time is long.

Ye Tian and the Dragon Gu Lord came here, and only in the long river of time, they could fight with confidence, and they didn't have to worry about causing any damage to the outside world, and no matter how the Legendary Realm Lord fought, he didn't want to affect the long river of time.

Rumble!!!!

The Dragon Ancient Lord turned into his body, which was his strongest state, and the countless scales and a defense time supreme technique made his defense reach an incomparably terrifying level

And Ye Tian did not underestimate the Dragon Gu Lord, after all, the Dragon Gu Lord had also comprehended the two Time Supreme Techniques, and it had been a long time since he entered the Legendary Realm Lord, and perhaps he had controlled other Dao, so his strength was naturally not bad.

So, Ye Tian didn't leave his hand anymore.

The supreme technology time barrier is added, and the supreme time domain realm is shrouded in this long river of time, increasing their strength.

Then, Ye Tian cast the Time Escape again, and the speed became incomparably fast.

Time drips!!!

Another time supreme technique was unleashed, and a drop of water directly pierced through the Dragon Ancient Lord.

At this time, Lord Longgu was really stunned by Ye Tian's methods.

It turned out to be four supreme skills, he thought that Ye Tian had three supreme skills.

Under the amplification of Time Domain Realm 08, the power of Time Dripping Water became extremely terrifying.

The Dragon Gu Lord urged the Time Supreme Technique, the Splitting Void Dragon Claw, and collided with Ye Tian's Time Drip.

Boom!

Lord Dragongu's claws were shaken back.

Then, the dense time dripping bombardment, this is the strength of the Legendary Realm Lord, using the Time Supreme Technique as a basic attack, and the half-step Legendary Realm Lord can't do such a means.

Click!!!

A large number of scales on the Dragon Ancient Lord's body were shattered, but such injuries were nothing to the Dragon Ancient Lord.

Immediately, the Dragon Gu Lord fought with Ye Tian in close quarters.

However, Ye Tian's time escape made his speed too fast, and it was difficult to lock his position.

As a result, the Dragon Gu Lord became a living target

In addition, Ye Tian condensed the supreme legendary body, and his strength was extremely terrifying, even an ordinary punch was enough to injure the Dragon Gu Lord.

Now.

The other Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land were all watching the battle, and seeing that the Dragon Gu Lord was completely crushed, they laughed and discussed it one by one.

"The strength of the Endless Lord is much stronger than that of the Dragon Gu Lord, and I am afraid that it is much stronger than the True Spirit Lord.

"The four supreme skills, plus the supreme legendary body, you can't think of it if you don't want to be strong!"

"If this trend continues, Lord Longgu won't be able to hold out for long.

"I think Lord Longgu can admit defeat. "

After a while, Lord Longgu was not lightly injured.

At this time, Lord Longgu said, "Endless Lord, I admit defeat and stop fighting!"

Ye Tian immediately stopped fighting.

At this time, other Legendary Realm Lords also came.

"Endless Lord, your strength is too strong, you don't look like a Legendary Realm Lord who has just broken through, if other Legendary Realm Lords underestimate you, I'm afraid it will be very miserable!"

Many lords smiled, and they were all amazed at Ye Tian's strength.

Ye Tian said a few words modestly, and soon dispersed.

After going back.

Ye Tian thought about how to cultivate next, and directly comprehend the space, it was too difficult.

"You still have to control the other Dao, and by controlling the many Dao, you will eventually control the space. "

Ye Tian planned.

Under the time, the first Dao Ye Tian who should be controlled had to ponder carefully.

After thinking about it for a long time, he was ready to take control of the kendo

The main attack of kendo is a very powerful way of time and space, and he himself has a solid foundation for kendo.

However, if you are so confused, it will definitely not work, the speed is too slow.

"It seems that you must obtain a legendary-level ancestor-level kendo talent!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Just like the legendary Time Ancestor, it is precisely because of this talent that he can quickly control time, otherwise, he is afraid that he will not be able to control time now.

If he had acquired the same level of kendo talent, it would have taken him too long to master kendo.

"If you want to obtain a Legendary-level Ancestral Gift-level kendo talent, you must copy a large number of Legendary-level Ancestor-level kendo talents, and I want to find a large number of Legendary-level Ancestor-level kendo talents. "

How to find it?

Maybe it was too difficult for a Legendary Lord or a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, but it wasn't very difficult for a Legendary Realm Lord like Ye Tian.

He can find a creature that contains a Legendary-level Kendo Ancestor, and then peek into his past and find his clan, and maybe he can find more Legendary-level Kendo Ancestor.

This is also the fastest way to do it.

However, which ethnic group is highly likely to have a large number of Legendary-level Sword Dao Ancestors, this needs to be investigated.

As a result, Ye Tian began to enter the Classics Library of the True Void Holy Land, as well as ask other Legendary Realm Lords to find information in this regard.

Soon, he found a race with a legendary kendo ancestor.

"Heavenly Sword Clan!"

There are quite a few people in this race, and it is not a race that has no intelligence like the Purple Aurora Beast.157.The Heavenly Sword Clan is a race with real great wisdom, similar to a race like the Human Race.

And everyone in the Heavenly Sword Clan has a kendodo talent, and the best of them have a legendary-level kendo ancestor.

In addition, the Heavenly Sword Clan has three Legendary Realm Lords, one of whom is a Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

That peak Legendary Realm Lord is the Sword One Lord of the Heavenly Sword Clan, known as the No. 1 Sword Dao in the Void Region, the other party not only controls time and space, but also controls the way of the sword, combining the two ways of the sword and time and space, creating an incomparably terrifying top supreme technique.

Therefore, the reputation of the Sword One Lord in the Void Region is still very large.

However, with the presence of the Sword One Lord, few people dared to break into the territory of the Heavenly Sword Clan.

"I broke into the territory of the Heavenly Sword Clan without permission, I am afraid that something will happen, so I still find a way to visit the Lord of the Sword One, so that I can enter the territory of the Heavenly Sword Clan and copy those legendary-level sword ancestors. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he inquired and knew that the Sword Lord would only see the Legendary Realm Lord who was proficient in the way of the sword, at least he had to control the way of the sword, or the peak Legendary Realm Lord, for the average Legendary Realm Lord, it was almost invisible.

Therefore, if he wants to meet the Sword One Lord, there is nothing he can do at the moment.

However, although he couldn't see the Sword One Lord, he thought of a way to enter the territory of the Heavenly Sword Clan. _
